ProductDescription.Description: Claude Usage Dock is a PowerToys Command Palette extension that keeps your Claude Code subscription usage in view. A dock tile shows how much of your 5-hour session limit and weekly limit remain, updated live; clicking it opens a details page with usage bars, an estimate of when your session will run out, a breakdown of what is driving your usage, and a monthly heatmap. The extension uses the token Claude Code already stores on your PC and talks only to Anthropic's official endpoints - no telemetry, no third parties, and your history stays in a local file. Requires PowerToys with the Command Palette and a signed-in Claude Code installation.
ProductDescription.ShortDescription: See your Claude Code subscription usage at a glance in the PowerToys Command Palette dock.
ProductDescription.ReleaseNotes: First stable release. Usage bars now show percent remaining, with a tabbed details page (Usage, Breakdown, Heatmap). Localized in English, German, French, Spanish, Japanese, and Simplified Chinese.

ScreenshotCaptions.Caption: The dock tile shows your session and weekly usage remaining at a glance.
Color-coded bars for your session, weekly, and per-model limits, each with its reset time.
See what's driving your usage: last-24h burn, daily average, and busiest period.
A monthly heatmap of your daily usage, GitHub-calendar style.

AppFeatures.AppFeature: Live dock tile with session and weekly usage remaining
Details page with color-coded usage bars and reset times
Burn-rate estimate of when your session runs out
Usage breakdown: last 24 h, daily average, busiest period
Low-quota desktop notification with a configurable threshold
Monitor up to three Claude accounts
Private by design: no telemetry, talks only to Anthropic
